title: 2026-06-04 Shino Tokyo Butter Yellow
summary: Four-image Shino character day album in Tokyo, using butter yellow across Koenji PAL map detour, Shimokitazawa live-house bass, BONUS TRACK / B&B zine notes, and a small after-live room.
summaryJa: 東京のアルバム。構成はマーケット、音楽の場、bookstore-library、室内。

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, in Koenji PAL Shopping Street after rain, checking a folded Tokyo map beside small trays of fish pins and accessories while wearing an ivory camp shirt, washed light denim chore jacket, oatmeal cropped trousers, black loafers, and a butter-yellow scarf tied to her tote
images.title: 01 Market Koenji PAL butter map

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, near a Shimokitazawa live-house entrance after a small show, quietly listening to bass beside flight cases, cables, pseudo flyers, and damp pavement while wearing a pale lavender blouse, butter-yellow cardigan, soft gray wide trousers, low black ankle boots, and a fish charm
images.title: 02 Music night Shimokitazawa livehouse bass

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, in a BONUS TRACK Shimokitazawa and B&B bookstore zine corner, writing fish-and-sound travel notes in a black notebook while comparing small zines, wearing an ivory blouse, butter-yellow utility vest, sage culotte trousers, brown loafers, and a fish charm
images.title: 03 Bookstore BONUS TRACK zine notes
images.locationDetail: BONUS TRACK Shimokitazawa and B&B bookstore zine corner

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, in a small rented room near Shimokitazawa after a live show, sorting notes, a fish guide, a folded flyer, headphones, a tiny ticket, and tea beside a rainy window while wearing an ivory rib tee, butter-yellow open-knit cardigan, sage relaxed trousers, and gray socks
images.title: 04 Home after live yellow cardigan
